About Organization

The BPSSC is a government organization responsible for recruiting candidates for various government jobs in Bihar, India.

The organization aims to provide employment opportunities to eligible candidates and contribute to the development of the state.

About the Programme

The Forest Range Officer Recruitment programme is a government job opportunity in the forestry sector.

The programme aims to recruit eligible candidates for the post of Forest Range Officer and provide them with training and employment opportunities.
